commands.cmd:
printf '{"results":['
sep=""
for proc in /usr/sbin/cron-d.worker; do
  pgrep -x -- "$proc" >/dev/null 2>&1
  rc=$?
  if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ]; then
    alive=true
  elif [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]; then
    alive=false
  else
    echo "pgrep failed for $proc (rc=$rc)" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  printf '%s{"name":"%s","alive":%s}' "$sep" "$proc" "$alive"
  sep=","
done
printf ']}'
